activities_projects.title: Detailed Character Sketch of Horace Danby
activities_projects.objective: Analyse Horace Danby’s character in detail
steps: Read the lesson carefully
Identify Horace Danby’s habits, values, and weaknesses
Write a paragraph explaining his personality
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity and relevance of points (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Justification of the Title
activities_projects.objective: Understand the appropriateness of the title
steps: Think about the meaning of the title
Relate it to the events in the story
Write 5–6 sentences justifying the title

activities_projects.title: Role of Trust in the Story
steps: Identify scenes involving trust
Explain how trust leads to Horace’s downfall

activities_projects.title: Comparison of Horace and the Young Lady
steps: List qualities of Horace Danby
List qualities of the young lady
Write a short comparison

activities_projects.title: Cause and Effect Chart
steps: List major actions in the story
Write their consequences

activities_projects.title: Narrator’s Viewpoint
steps: Observe how the narrator presents Horace
Write 4–5 sentences explaining the viewpoint

activities_projects.title: Irony in the Story
activities_projects.objective: Identify irony used in the prose
steps: Find ironic situations in the story
Explain one situation in detail

activities_projects.title: Theme Explanation
steps: Identify the main theme
Support it with examples from the story

activities_projects.title: Alternate Title Suggestion
steps: Think of a suitable alternate title
Explain why it fits the story

activities_projects.title: Moral Analysis
steps: Identify the moral lesson
Explain how the story conveys it
